settings.items: TRAIN HEAVY, TRAIN OFTEN, REST WHEN YOU EARN IT, FIELD TESTED, NO SHORTCUTS, MORE WORK

settings.title: NEW THIS WEEK
settings.intro: Just landed. Limited stock on each cut. Each piece field-tested through a full training block before it earns a SKU.

settings.title: BUILT TO THE NUMBER
settings.intro: Every cut, fabric, and finish exists for a measurable reason.

settings.title: WE TRAIN IN WHAT WE MAKE.
settings.body: Gymbrat started in a Gurgaon garage with one rule — if it can't survive a year of squats, it doesn't ship. Every prototype gets worn through a full block before it earns a SKU. Nothing leaves the studio because it looks good in a photo.

settings.title: Free Shipping
settings.body: Free shipping in India on orders over ₹2999. Need it sooner? Contact us to arrange expedited delivery.

settings.title: Free Returns
settings.body: 14-day no-questions returns on unworn pieces with tags. Tried it, not for you? Send it back.

settings.title: Built To Last
settings.body: Heavyweight cotton, lock-stitch seams, four-way stretch where it matters. Field-tested for 40+ wash cycles.

settings.quote: Six months in, no pilling, no lost shape. The shorts hold up to leg day in a way nothing else has.
settings.name: RAHUL S.

settings.quote: First brand where the cut works for both deadlifts and the office after. Fits like it was patterned for me.
settings.name: ANANYA K.

settings.title: QUESTIONS
settings.intro: What people ask before they buy.

settings.a: True to size for our oversized cuts. If you're between sizes, size down for a snug fit.
Heavyweight 240 GSM cotton on tops. 280 GSM French terry on hoodies. Lightweight stretch on shorts and joggers.

settings.q: How do I care for it?
settings.a: Cold wash inside-out, hang dry. Skip the tumble dryer to keep the cut and color.
Free shipping in India over ₹2999. 14-day returns on unworn pieces with tags.
